content:
# 1-springMVC基本配置

#### 1.springmvc的处理器对应的bean有自己的规范格式



**spring的bean交给spring去管理**

**springmvc的bean交给springmvc去管理**

避免加入无效bean可通过**bean加载过滤器**进行**包含**或者**排除**



```xml
<context:component-scan base-package="com.itheima">
    <context:include-filter
                            type="annotation"
                            expression="org.springframework.stereotype.Controller"/>
</context:component-scan>
```



#### 2.加载静态的资源

**发起请求后 拦截所有的请求 不能加载静态资源 加载静态资源的时候 进行放行**

··1.添加mvc命名空间

··2.springmvc内添加放行配置

```xml
有bug
<!--放行指定类型静态资源配置方式-->
<mvc:resources mapping="/img/**" location="/img/"/>
<mvc:resources mapping="/js/**" location="/js/"/>
<mvc:resources mapping="/css/**" location="/css/"/>

1-
/→→→→→→→→→→→→→→*.do

```

放行的通用配置

```xml
<!--SpringMVC提供的通用资源放行方式-->
<mvc:default-servlet-handler/>
```





#### 3.乱码的处理

**springmvc提供中文字符过滤器，专门用来配置对乱码的处理**

配置在**web.xml**文件中

```xml
只能处理post请求乱码
tomcat8 以上已经处理了get乱码问题

<filter>
    <filter-name>CharacterEncodingFilter</filter-name>
    <filter-class>org.springframework.web.filter.CharacterEncodingFilter</filter-class>
    <init-param>
        <param-name>encoding</param-name>
        <param-value>UTF-8</param-value>
    </init-param>
</filter>


<filter-mapping>
    <filter-name>CharacterEncodingFilter</filter-name>
    <url-pattern>/*</url-pattern>
</filter-mapping>
```



### 4.注解驱动





**①  代替spring-mvc.xml**

**②  代替web.xml**





##### 1.创建SpringMVCConfiguration.java

###### **①  代替spring-mvc.xml**

```java
@Configuration

@ComponentScan(value = "com.itheima",includeFilters =
    @ComponentScan.Filter(
        				type=FilterType.ANNOTATION,
                          classes = {Controller.class}
                         )
    )

public class SpringMVCConfiguration implements WebMvcConfigurer{
    
    
    //注解配置放行指定资源格式
//    @Override
//    public void addResourceHandlers(ResourceHandlerRegistry registry) {
//        registry.addResourceHandler("/img/**").addResourceLocations("/img/");
//        registry.addResourceHandler("/js/**").addResourceLocations("/js/");
//        registry.addResourceHandler("/css/**").addResourceLocations("/css/");
//    }

    //注解配置通用放行资源的格式
    @Override
    public void configureDefaultServletHandling(DefaultServletHandlerConfigurer configurer) {
        configurer.enable();;
    }
}
```

##### 2.加载SpringMVC核心配置类

**②  代替web.xml**

**		1.创建SpringMVC核心配置类ServletContainersInitConfig  **

**		2.继承AbstractDispatcherServletInitializer                           **



①

```xml
<servlet>
    <servlet-name>DispatherServlet</servlet-name>
    <servlet-class>org.springframework.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet</servlet-class>
    <init-param>
      <param-name>contextConfigLocation</param-name>
      <param-value>classpath*:spring-mvc.xml</param-value>
    </init-param>
  </servlet>
```

↓↓↓↓↓↓

```java

//创建Servlet容器时，使用注解的方式加载SPRINGMVC配置类中的信息，并加载成WEB专用的			  //ApplicationContext对象
//该对象放入了ServletContext范围，后期在整个WEB容器中可以随时获取调用
@Override
    protected WebApplicationContext createServletApplicationContext() {
        AnnotationConfigWebApplicationContext ctx = new AnnotationConfigWebApplicationContext();
        ctx.register(SpringMVCConfiguration.class);
        return ctx;
    }
```



###### ②

```xml
<servlet-mapping>
    <servlet-name>DispatherServlet</servlet-name>
    <url-pattern>/</url-pattern>
  </servlet-mapping>
```

↓↓↓↓↓↓

```java
//注解配置映射地址方式，服务于SpringMVC的核心控制器DispatcherServlet
    @Override
    protected String[] getServletMappings() {
        return new String[]{"/"};
    }
```



③覆盖onStartup方法 启动的时候 将乱码处理作为过滤器

```xml
<filter>
    <filter-name>CharacterEncodingFilter</filter-name>
    <filter-class>org.springframework.web.filter.CharacterEncodingFilter</filter-class>
    <init-param>
        <param-name>encoding</param-name>
        <param-value>UTF-8</param-value>
    </init-param>
</filter>


<filter-mapping>
    <filter-name>CharacterEncodingFilter</filter-name>
    <url-pattern>/*</url-pattern>
</filter-mapping>
```

↓↓↓↓↓↓

```java
 @Override
    public void onStartup(ServletContext servletContext) throws ServletException {
        
super.onStartup(servletContext);//原始功能
        
CharacterEncodingFilter cef = new CharacterEncodingFilter();//创建字符集过滤器
cef.setEncoding("UTF-8");//设置字符集
FilterRegistration.Dynamic registration = servletContext.addFilter("characterEncodingFilter", cef);//添加一个过滤器
        
        registration.addMappingForUrlPatterns(EnumSet.of(//添加映射url地址
            DispatcherType.REQUEST,
            DispatcherType.FORWARD,
            DispatcherType.INCLUDE),
            false,
            "/*");
        
    }
```

title: springMVC date: 2020-09-29 20:35:59 # springMVC入门案例 #### 1.导入坐标(pom.xml) ```xml 4.0.0 war SpringMVCTest org.example SpringMVCTest 1.0-SNAPSHOT UTF-8 1.8 1.8 javax.servlet javax.servlet-api 3.1.0 provided javax.servlet.jsp jsp-api 2.1 provided org.springframework spring-context 5.1.9.RELEASE org.springframework spring-web 5.1.9.RELEASE org.springframework spring-webmvc 5.1.9.RELEASE org.apache.tomcat.maven tomcat7-maven-plugin 2.1 8080 / ``` #### 2.创建web.xml(web.xml) ```xml DispatherServlet org.springframework.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet contextConfigLocation classpath*:spring-mvc.xml DispatherServlet / ``` #### #### 3.定义springmvc,等同于applicationContext 1. **配置包扫描所有包含bean 的类（springmvc.xml)** 2. **读取bean中上方标注@RequestMapping的内容** ```xml ``` #### 4.定义表现层业务处理器controller,并配成spring的bean 等同于servlet ```java @Controller public class UserController { @RequestMapping("/save") public String save(){ System.out.println("UserController....save"); return "success.jsp"; } } ``` #### 5.定义UserServlet(success.jsp) ```java

第一个mvc界面

title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to [Hexo](https://hexo.io/)! This is your very first post. Check [documentation](https://hexo.io/docs/) for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in [troubleshooting](https://hexo.io/docs/troubleshooting.html) or you can ask me on [GitHub](https://github.com/hexojs/hexo/issues).

## Quick Start

### Create a new post

``` bash
$ hexo new "My New Post"
```

More info: [Writing](https://hexo.io/docs/writing.html)

### Run server

``` bash
$ hexo server
```

More info: [Server](https://hexo.io/docs/server.html)

### Generate static files

``` bash
$ hexo generate
```

More info: [Generating](https://hexo.io/docs/generating.html)

### Deploy to remote sites

``` bash
$ hexo deploy
```

More info: [Deployment](https://hexo.io/docs/one-command-deployment.html)
